text: {"is_complete": false, "next_step": {"type": "select", "prompt_text": "Welcome to FYP I registration. First — which project category fits what you want to do? This decides your supervisor pool, deliverables, and ethics-review pathway.", "config": {"options": [{"value": "research", "label": "Research (R)", "description": "Academic research with literature review, methodology, results. Supervised by research-active staff."}, {"value": "app_dev", "label": "Application Development (AD)", "description": "Build a working software system. Most common category. Deliverable: working prototype + technical documentation."}, {"value": "industry", "label": "Industry-linked (IL)", "description": "Project sponsored by an external company. Requires Letter of Industry Engagement signed by company representative."}, {"value": "capstone", "label": "Capstone (C)", "description": "Multi-disciplinary group project (3–4 students), integrating multiple subject areas."}]}}, "reasoning": "FYP at FSKTM is classified into 4 categories per the FSKTM Undergraduate Handbook 2026. Category determines supervisor pool, deliverables, and ethics-review pathway, so this is the right first question.", "running_summary": "Year 3 FSKTM student starting FYP I registration.", "citations": ["Project Categories", "Eligibility"]}
